# combo_linearity

## combo_000_s2

### Selected Cases
- `mix_b128_ld1_indir_p128_lp4_r1000`: `data_mode=indirect`, `ldr_count_per_unit=1`, `lines_per_page=4`, `pages=128`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`
- `mix_b128_ld14_lin_p512_lp1_r1000`: `data_mode=linear`, `ldr_count_per_unit=14`, `lines_per_page=1`, `pages=512`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`

### Combination Rule
- combo size: `2`
- rejected if every selected case is a hot booster template
- canonical order: `mix_b128_ld1_indir_p128_lp4_r1000+mix_b128_ld14_lin_p512_lp1_r1000`

## combo_060_s5

### Selected Cases
- `mix_b128_ld14_indir_p1_lp1_r1000`: `data_mode=indirect`, `ldr_count_per_unit=14`, `lines_per_page=1`, `pages=1`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`
- `mix_b128_ld2_pshuf_p128_lp1_r1000`: `data_mode=page_shuffle`, `ldr_count_per_unit=2`, `lines_per_page=1`, `pages=128`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`
- `mix_b128_ld1_pshuf_p512_lp4_r1000`: `data_mode=page_shuffle`, `ldr_count_per_unit=1`, `lines_per_page=4`, `pages=512`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`
- `mix_b64_ld4_indir_p128_lp4_r1000`: `data_mode=indirect`, `ldr_count_per_unit=4`, `lines_per_page=4`, `pages=128`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=4096`
- `mix_b64_ld1_xpage_p1_lp1_r1000`: `data_mode=cross_page`, `ldr_count_per_unit=1`, `lines_per_page=1`, `pages=1`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=4096`

### Combination Rule
- combo size: `5`
- rejected if every selected case is a hot booster template
- canonical order: `mix_b128_ld14_indir_p1_lp1_r1000+mix_b128_ld2_pshuf_p128_lp1_r1000+mix_b128_ld1_pshuf_p512_lp4_r1000+mix_b64_ld4_indir_p128_lp4_r1000+mix_b64_ld1_xpage_p1_lp1_r1000`

- `mix_b64_ld14_pshuf_p512_lp4_r1000`: `data_mode=page_shuffle`, `ldr_count_per_unit=14`, `lines_per_page=4`, `pages=512`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=4096`

- `mix_b128_ld1_xpage_p1_lp4_r1000`: `data_mode=cross_page`, `ldr_count_per_unit=1`, `lines_per_page=4`, `pages=1`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`

- `mix_b128_ld4_lin_p524288_lp4_r1000`: `data_mode=linear`, `ldr_count_per_unit=4`, `lines_per_page=4`, `pages=524288`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`
- `mix_b128_ld2_xpage_p512_lp4_r1000`: `data_mode=cross_page`, `ldr_count_per_unit=2`, `lines_per_page=4`, `pages=512`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`

- `mix_b128_ld7_pshuf_p512_lp4_r1000`: `data_mode=page_shuffle`, `ldr_count_per_unit=7`, `lines_per_page=4`, `pages=512`, `region_reps=1000`, `size=8192`

- canonical order: `mix_b64_ld1_lin_p524288_lp4_r1000+mix_b64_ld7_indir_p524288_lp4_r1000+mix_b128_ld2_lin_p1_lp1_r1000+mix_b64_ld1_xpage_p128_lp1_r1000+mix_b64_ld7_xpage_p512_lp4_r1000+mix_b64_ld4_xpage_p128_lp4_r1000+mix_b64_ld14_lin_p512_lp4_r1000`

### Combination Rule
- combo size: `7`
- rejected if every selected case is a hot booster template

- rejected if every selected case is a hot booster template
